title: cyperus ajax
intro: Cyperus ajax, also known as Cyperus papyrus, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus ajax include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Cyperus ajax can be made by infusing the roots or rhizomes in water or oil, and it can be used as a tea, tincture, or topical application.
